compiled_state.title: Add RED structural tests for ADR always-generated behavior to test-architect-foundation-skill.sh
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## What
Add 4 new RED structural boundary test functions to tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh for ADR always-generated story.

## File Impact
- tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh (add 4 test functions + update header count)
- .test-index (append 4 RED marker lines)

## TDD Requirement
testing_mode: RED
New tests will FAIL until 6d81-e870 Task 2 adds Phase 2.8 to SKILL.md.
TDD exemption: these are structural boundary tests (Rule 5 — non-executable LLM instruction file).

## Tests to Add (insert before print_summary)

test_adrs_always_generated: grep -qiE 'always generate.*adr' SKILL.md
test_adr_session_scope: grep -qiE 'generat.*adr.*session' SKILL.md
test_adr_dedup_logic: grep -qiE 'dedup|deduplication' SKILL.md
test_no_adr_preference_question: NEGATIVE — grep -q 'ADR preference' SKILL.md must NOT match

For test_no_adr_preference_question:
  adr_pref_found='not-referenced'
  if grep -q 'ADR preference' SKILL.md; then adr_pref_found='referenced'; fi
  assert_eq 'test_no_adr_preference_question' 'not-referenced' "$adr_pref_found"

## Header Update
Run: count=$(grep -c '^test_.*().*{' tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh)
Update the 'Validates (N named assertions)' header line to reflect the new count.

## .test-index Entries to Append (standalone RED markers)
plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh [test_adrs_always_generated]
plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh [test_adr_session_scope]
plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh [test_adr_dedup_logic]
plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh [test_no_adr_preference_question]

## Verification
Run bash tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh — the 4 new tests must FAIL, all previous tests must PASS.
